steps.title: Use the given x-value
steps.content: The second equation is already $x=11$, so every possible solution must have $x=11$. Substitute $11$ into the other equation.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: The ordered pair is $(11,12)$. Substituting it gives $5(11)-4(12)=55-48=7$, so it satisfies both equations. The result matches.
